stemHtml: LUGBERRY VOR is 5 miles north of you. How do you report your position for radar identification?

options.a: POSITION LUGBERRY VOR FIVE MILES NORTH, G-ACZG
options.b: ONE EIGHT ZERO FIVE FROM LUGBERRY VOR, G-ACZG
options.c: POSITION FIVE MILES SOUTH OF LUGBERRY VOR, G-ACZG
options.d: LUGBERRY VOR FIVE MILES ONE EIGHT ZERO, G-ACZG
